creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253913
Makefile v1

net/libngtcp2_gnutls fixed!

> nettle is according the manual needed for Ed448 support
nettle used by gnutls, but knot doesn't use it directly.

I have:
    Ed448 support:          yes
even without nettle in Makefile.

Also we don't need BUILD_DEPENDS=port if we have LIB_DEPENDS=port.

So I suggest to commit my Makefile.
